questions.question: What movie, often credited with having the last word on Gen Xers, had four friends dancing to 'My Sharona' inside a gas station?
What was Spuds McKenzie's favorite beer?
Why did Stevie Wonder use the telephone?
questions.answer: 'I Just Called to Say I Love You'

questions.question: What came down in 1989, signalling the defrosting of the Cold War?
Who, after being shot by a would-be assassin, jokingly told attending surgeons 'Please tell me you're Republicans.'?
